config.script:
'CFileDrive #include "50211"
dim g_strCaptchaText: g_strCaptchaText = ""
'---------------------- 'otwórz/zamknij stronę '---------------------- function fopen() fopen=true end function
function fback() page_.result = vbCancel page_.goback() fback = true end function
'---------------------- 'naciśnięcie na klawisz '---------------------- sub page_click(byref pHli) page_.result=pHli.prop(GVAR_MODALRES) page_.goback end sub
'------------------- 'buduj potwierdzenie '------------------- function buildPotwCaptcha(byref strCaptchaText) dim pFD, bOK set pFD = CFileDrive(bOK)
if (not bOK) then view_message 6186, 0 exit function end if
dim strFilePath: strFilePath = pFD.GetTempPath() + "\captcha.jpg"
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CHAPTCHA_PICTURE).image = strFilePath
buildPotwCaptcha = page_.domodalauto()
if buildPotwCaptcha = 1 then strCaptchaText = g_strCaptchaText end if
end function
function c##CTRLID_CHAPTCHA_TEXT##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = g_strCaptchaText c##CTRLID_CHAPTCHA_TEXT##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_CHAPTCHA_TEXT##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) g_strCaptchaText = newValue c##CTRLID_CHAPTCHA_TEXT##_ondataentered = true end function
function on_ok() page_.result = vbOK page_.goback end function
